title: Bench Programming — Honda Motorcycle Cluster
description: Bench-mode programming of a Honda motorcycle instrument cluster. Direct PCB connections were made for secure memory access, the original data was read and verified, then the cluster was programmed and tested on the bench.
image_alt: Honda motorcycle cluster bench programming EEPROM service AKEI Latvia
meta_description: Honda motorcycle instrument cluster bench programming and EEPROM service with final functional verification.
